creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey!

After updating: 

mumble: 1.3.3_9 -> 1.5.517

mumble does not start:

romain@zappy ~ % mumble 
<X>2023-08-11 12:41:13.274 Loading settings from legacy settings file "/home/romain/.config/Mumble/Mumble.conf"
<F>2023-08-11 12:41:13.282 QWidget: Cannot create a QWidget without QApplication
romain@zappy ~ %

I tried to move my configuration away in case it helps but no success:

romain@zappy ~ % mv ~/.config/Mumble{,.orig}
romain@zappy ~ % mumble
<F>2023-08-11 12:41:41.685 QWidget: Cannot create a QWidget without QApplication
romain@zappy ~ %
